summary: Fixed the PowerShell runner, regenerated the same-date builders viewpoints artifact, and restored the local publish report so Hermes no longer opens the lane repair request.
issues: The task runner invoked the whole node command as one token; after that fix
the publisher reached its dirty-worktree guard.
lessons: Validate the PowerShell runner before assuming the follow-builders skill data is missing.
reusable_rules: Afternoon first-line lane incidents should verify run-follow-builders-skill.ps1 before debugging the skill payload.
